_metadata.description: Argus AI Service Detection Catalog — domains, processes, ports, config paths, and packages for known AI services

chatbots_and_assistants.name: ChatGPT
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: MCP support in developer mode since late 2025. ChatGPT desktop app available on Windows and macOS.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Claude
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: MCP natively supported. Desktop extensions use .mcpb file format (formerly .dxt). Over 1000 community MCP servers.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Claude Code
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: CLI coding agent. Voice mode via /voice. 1M token context with Opus 4.6. Scheduled cloud tasks. Native installer preferred over npm.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Claude Cowork
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: Launched January 2026 as research preview. Desktop agent with file system access and computer use. Runs on macOS.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Grok
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: Grok 4.20 flagship model. API compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic SDKs. Available via grok.com, mobile apps, and X.com.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Perplexity AI
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: Comet browser launched 2025 (Chromium-based). Enterprise MDM deployment available.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Perplexity Comet Browser
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: AI-native Chromium browser. Available on Windows, macOS, Android, iOS. Enterprise version with MDM silent deployment and domain-level agent controls.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: DeepSeek
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: OpenAI-compatible API. Models: DeepSeek-V3.2, DeepSeek-R1. Desktop app via Electron wrapper or PWA. Third-party Mac apps via Fello AI.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Qwen (Tongyi Qianwen)
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: Qwen3.5 released Feb 2026 (397B params, 201 languages). Available via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio. Regional API endpoints in US, China, Singapore.

chatbots_and_assistants.name: Microsoft Copilot
chatbots_and_assistants.notes: Wave 2 update with Copilot Pages and Copilot Agents. Embedded in Excel, PowerPoint, Teams.

coding_assistants.name: GitHub Copilot
coding_assistants.notes: Agent mode with MCP support in VS Code (GA 2026). Coding agent for autonomous tasks. JetBrains agentic mode GA March 2026.

coding_assistants.name: Cursor
coding_assistants.notes: MCP Apps marketplace launched Feb 2026. Cloud Agents with Computer Use. Bugbot Autofix. Automations triggered by Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty. Supports stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP MCP transports.

coding_assistants.name: Windsurf
coding_assistants.notes: Acquired by Cognition AI for ~$250M (Dec 2025). $82M ARR. GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.6 available. Auto-Generate Memories feature. JetBrains plugin available.

coding_assistants.name: Cline
coding_assistants.notes: VS Code extension (marketplace ID: saoudrizwan.claude-dev). 5M+ developers. Autonomous coding agent. Supports OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, Vertex, Ollama, LM Studio.

coding_assistants.name: Continue
coding_assistants.notes: Open-source AI coding assistant. VS Code and JetBrains extensions. Supports local models via Ollama.

coding_assistants.name: Aider
coding_assistants.notes: CLI-based AI pair programmer. Installs via pip (aider-chat). Auto-commits to git. Supports GPT-4o, Claude, local models.

coding_assistants.name: Tabnine
coding_assistants.notes: IDE extension for code completion. Enterprise version with private model deployment.

coding_assistants.name: Sourcegraph Cody
coding_assistants.notes: AI coding assistant with deep codebase search. VS Code extension. Connects to entire codebase including remote repos.

coding_assistants.name: Amazon Q Developer
coding_assistants.notes: Full-lifecycle AI coding assistant with 5 specialized agents. Supports VS Code, JetBrains, Visual Studio, Eclipse. Uses IAM for access control.

coding_assistants.name: Gemini Code Assist
coding_assistants.notes: Agent mode in VS Code and IntelliJ. Jules agent for async coding tasks (cloud VM, Gemini 2.5 Pro). Launched 2025.

coding_assistants.name: Augment Code
coding_assistants.notes: IDE extension for VS Code and JetBrains. Intent workspace for multi-agent orchestration. Context engine for 100M+ line codebases.

coding_assistants.name: Qodo (formerly Codium)
coding_assistants.notes: Qodo 2.0 released Feb 2026 with multi-agent architecture. VS Code extension for AI code review and test generation. MCP tool support.

coding_assistants.name: OpenAI Codex
coding_assistants.notes: Cloud-based coding agent (codex-1 model, optimized o3). Runs in isolated containers. No internet during task execution. Desktop app on Windows (March 2026) and macOS. Also available as CLI (openai/codex on GitHub).

coding_assistants.name: Devin
coding_assistants.notes: Autonomous AI software engineer. Devin 2.0 with IDE experience. API for CI/CD integration. Sandboxed dev environment with editor, terminal, browser.

ai_app_builders.name: Replit
ai_app_builders.notes: Agent 4 for autonomous app building. Domain purchasing for members. Deploys to .replit.app subdomains.

ai_app_builders.name: Lovable
ai_app_builders.notes: $330M Series B at $6.6B valuation (Dec 2025). Full-stack app generation from natural language. $200M ARR.

ai_app_builders.name: Bolt.new
ai_app_builders.notes: Browser-based full-stack dev via WebContainer. $40M ARR in 6 months. No local setup needed.

ai_app_builders.name: v0
ai_app_builders.notes: Rebranded from v0.dev to v0.app (Jan 2026). React/Tailwind component generation. Figma-to-code. Frontend only.

local_inference.name: Ollama
local_inference.notes: v0.18.3 (March 2026). REST API on port 11434. Native Windows ARM64 build. Web search plugin. /api/metrics endpoint new in 2026. 100+ models supported. No authentication by default.

local_inference.name: LM Studio
local_inference.notes: v0.4.8 (March 2026). llmster is the new headless daemon process. LM Link for remote instances with E2E encryption via Tailscale. OpenAI-compatible API on port 1234.

local_inference.name: llama.cpp / llama-server
local_inference.notes: C++ LLM inference. llamafile bundles model + runtime in single executable.

local_inference.name: KoboldCpp
local_inference.notes: Local LLM inference with web UI.

local_inference.name: text-generation-webui (oobabooga)
local_inference.notes: Gradio-based web UI for local LLM inference.

local_inference.name: vLLM
local_inference.notes: High-throughput LLM serving engine. OpenAI-compatible API.

local_inference.name: Open WebUI
local_inference.notes: Web UI frontend for Ollama and other local LLM servers.

api_gateways_and_routers.name: OpenRouter
api_gateways_and_routers.notes: Unified API gateway for 300+ models from 60+ providers. OpenAI-compatible API. Automatic failover and routing.

api_gateways_and_routers.name: LiteLLM
api_gateways_and_routers.notes: LLM proxy server. Unified API for 100+ LLM providers.

api_gateways_and_routers.name: Together AI
api_gateways_and_routers.notes: Cloud inference platform for open-source models.

api_gateways_and_routers.name: Fireworks AI
api_gateways_and_routers.notes: Fast inference platform. Serverless and dedicated deployments.

api_gateways_and_routers.name: Anyscale
api_gateways_and_routers.notes: Enterprise AI compute platform built on Ray.

mcp_platforms.name: Smithery
mcp_platforms.notes: MCP server registry with 7,300+ tools. Local and hosted server support. CLI for install/manage. 6,000+ servers listed.

mcp_platforms.name: Composio
mcp_platforms.notes: Managed MCP hosting with 1,000+ pre-built tools. SOC2/ISO/HIPAA certified. API key enforcement default since March 2026. 99.9% SLA.

mcp_platforms.name: Glama
mcp_platforms.notes: Largest MCP directory with 17,200+ servers. Hosting + AI chat interface + API gateway. Trusted by 50,000+ businesses.

mcp_platforms.name: Official MCP Registry
mcp_platforms.notes: Official MCP protocol registry. MCP spec maintained at modelcontextprotocol.io.

agent_frameworks.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
agent_frameworks.notes: v0.12.5 with built-in MCP server tool integration. Supports tool use, handoffs, guardrails, tracing. Provider-agnostic.

agent_frameworks.name: LangChain
agent_frameworks.notes: LLM application framework. LangSmith for observability.

agent_frameworks.name: LlamaIndex
agent_frameworks.notes: Data framework for LLM applications. RAG-focused.

agent_frameworks.name: AutoGen
agent_frameworks.notes: Multi-agent conversation framework by Microsoft Research.

agent_protocols.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
agent_protocols.notes: Open protocol for tool/context sharing with LLMs. v1.27 as of 2026. Supported by Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code Copilot, OpenAI Agents SDK.

agent_protocols.name: Agent2Agent (A2A)
agent_protocols.notes: v0.3 with gRPC support. Agent Cards published at well-known URLs. Focuses on inter-agent discovery and communication. Complements MCP.

model_hubs.name: Hugging Face
model_hubs.notes: Largest model hub. Model downloads via Git LFS. Token stored in ~/.cache/huggingface/token.

model_hubs.name: ModelScope
model_hubs.notes: Chinese model hub. Alternative to Hugging Face for Chinese models.

model_hubs.name: Replicate
model_hubs.notes: Run ML models in the cloud via API.

image_and_media_ai.name: Midjourney
image_and_media_ai.notes: AI image generation. Accessed via Discord bot and web interface.

image_and_media_ai.name: Stability AI
image_and_media_ai.notes: Stable Diffusion models. API and open-source releases.

productivity_ai.name: Notion AI
productivity_ai.notes: AI writing and knowledge management integrated into Notion.

productivity_ai.name: Grammarly
productivity_ai.notes: AI writing assistant with browser extension and desktop app.

productivity_ai.name: Zapier AI / Zapier Agents
productivity_ai.notes: AI-powered automation agents. MCP server support for Windsurf/Cursor/Claude. 8,000+ app integrations.
